cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently highlight the value of flexible shifts and a supportive approach to work-life balance.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: Some staff report exhaustion and dissatisfaction with compensation levels, impacting their overall experience.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Reports of micromanagement and inconsistent workflows contribute to feelings of being overlooked and lacking career progression.
